city in and county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States
description_wiki: El Paso (English:  ; Spanish: [el ˈpaso] , lit. 'the route' or 'the pass') is a city in and the county seat of El Paso County, Texas, United States.

description: worldwide economic depression (1929–1939)
description_wiki: The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: active United States Army National Guard formation
description_wiki: The 38th Infantry Division is an infantry division of the United States Army and part of the Indiana National Guard.

description: former US Army post in Indianapolis, IN, US 1906-1991
description_wiki: Fort Benjamin Harrison was a U.S. Army post located in suburban Lawrence Township, Marion County, Indiana, northeast of Indianapolis, between 1906 and 1991.

description: National Guard training facility near Hattiesburg, Mississippi, US
description_wiki: Camp Shelby is a U.S. Army post whose south gate is located at the southern boundary of Hattiesburg, Mississippi, along U.S. Highway 49.

description: component of the U.S. Army and military of the state of Indiana
description_wiki: The Indiana National Guard (INNG) is a component of the United States Armed Forces, the United States National Guard and the Military Department of Indiana (MDI).

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Louisiana (French: Louisiane; Spanish: Luisiana [lwiˈsjana]; Louisiana Creole: Lwizyàn) is a state in the Deep South and South Central regions of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Texas (  TEK-səss) is the most populous state in the Southern United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: largest city of the state of Louisiana, United States
description_wiki: New Orleans (commonly known as NOLA or  The Big Easy, among other nicknames) is a consolidated city-parish located along the Mississippi River in the U.S. state of Louisiana.

description: large canal in Panama
description_wiki: The Panama Canal (Spanish: Canal de Panamá) is an artificial 82-kilometer (51-mile) waterway in Panama that connects the Caribbean Sea with the Pacific Ocean.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: island in the Pacific Ocean
description_wiki: New Guinea (Tok Pisin: Niugini; Hiri Motu: Niu Gini; Indonesian: Papua, fossilized Nugini, also known as Papua or historically Irian) is the world's second-largest island, with an area of 785,753 km2 (303,381 sq mi).

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

aliases: Fort Kamehameha Flying Field Tracts A and B
description: United States Air Force base at Honolulu International Airport, Hawaii, USA
military unit
description_wiki: The 20th Infantry Regiment ("Sykes' Regulars") is a United States Army infantry regiment.

description: 1917-1994 United States Army formation
description_wiki: The 6th Infantry Division was an infantry division of the United States Army active in World War I, World War II, and the last years of the Cold War.

description: capital of Tuvalu
description_wiki: Funafuti is an atoll, comprising numerous islets, that is a capital of Tuvalu.

description: former country, now Vanuatu
description_wiki: New Hebrides, named after the Hebrides in Scotland by Captain James Cook in 1774, was the colonial name for the island group in the South Pacific Ocean that is now Vanuatu.

description: bay in Papua New Guinea
description_wiki: Oro Bay is a bay in Oro Province, Papua New Guinea, located 15 miles (24 km) southeast of Buna.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.
